metadata.rationale: 该样本的核心新闻事件系虚构：可用素材与原始证据一致指向的事实恰恰是2026年3月8日美国大多数地区仍按惯例在凌晨2点进入夏令时，而非被白宫紧急叫停。与此同时，文中多张图片并非真实记录这一“取消夏令时”事件的新闻现场，而是由生成图、后期加字编辑图或与政策无关的原图拼装成所谓证据，导致文本事实、图像内容和图文绑定关系同时失真，整体核心命题无法成立，应判为 False。

The news text claims the main image displays a large electronic screen in New York's Times Square. However, the image clearly shows the text "U.S. DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION" beneath the screen, identifying the location as the Harry S. Truman Building in Washington, D.C., not Times Square. This is a factual inconsistency. Additionally, the sign "Daylight Saving Time Canceled" is a known artifact of the "Issue USA" marketing campaign, not an actual federal policy change, making the text's claim of an "official federal cancellation" false.
